text:
It also happens on my machine with this configuration:

--------------------------
FreeBSD BWEPCFERNANDEZ 12.0-ALPHA7 FreeBSD 12.0-ALPHA7 r338940 GENERIC  amd64

The error comes with the kernel driver.
I tried installing emulators/virtualbox-ose in the version 5.2.16 (5.2.18 for kmod) and also breaks. When I install the version 5.2.16 for both, it works.
